V1-STAB-001.title: Make quota enforcement fatal in SyscallDispatcher
V1-STAB-001.notes: try/except/else split at line 193-203. Quota failure returns error_envelope; infra exceptions fail-open with WARNING.

V1-STAB-002.title: Add max_execution_ms timeout to NodusRuntimeAdapter
V1-STAB-002.notes: NodusTimeoutError + threading.Timer + ctypes.PyThreadState_SetAsyncExc. Default 30,000ms. run_script/run_file/_execute all wired.

V1-STAB-003.title: Replace SECRET_KEY default in .env.example
V1-STAB-003.notes: AINDY/.env.example uses REPLACE_THIS_... prefix. config.py reject_insecure_secret_key raises RuntimeError on insecure defaults (skipped when ENV=test).

V1-STAB-004.title: Implement production-grade /health endpoint
V1-STAB-004.notes: Non-blocking 2-second threaded DB check via SELECT 1. Always returns HTTP 200 with {status, db, version}. status=degraded if DB unreachable.

V1-STAB-005.title: Make version.json the single source of version truth
V1-STAB-005.notes: _read_version() in config.py reads version.json at import time with 1.0.0 fallback. VERSION: str = Field(default_factory=_read_version, exclude=True) in Settings. health_router.py uses settings.VERSION directly (no getattr fallback).

V1-STAB-006.title: Verify all Alembic migrations committed and at head
V1-STAB-006.notes: 108 migration files present, latest g5h6i7j8k9l0. Guards added: _check_alembic_head() startup warn (non-fatal) in main.py lifespan; `python -m alembic check` CI step after upgrade head. Remaining: operator must run `alembic current` + `alembic heads` against a live DB to mark complete.

V1-STAB-007.title: Add structured JSON logging
V1-STAB-007.notes: python-json-logger>=2.0.7 added to requirements.txt (UTF-16 preserved). config.py: _build_log_handler() replaces old setup. is_prod -> JsonFormatter (%(asctime)s %(levelname)s %(name)s %(message)s). dev/test -> plain %(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s. pythonjsonlogger import inside is_prod block only — not required in dev/test.

V1-STAB-008.title: Ensure stack traces never returned in API responses
V1-STAB-008.notes: unhandled_exception_handler at main.py:329 returns {error, message, details:null}. No traceback in response body. HTTPException and ValidationError handlers also clean.

V1-REFACT-001.title: Create new package directory skeleton
V1-REFACT-001.notes: All 6 packages present. kernel/ fully populated (7 files + __init__.py). memory/, agents/, platform_layer/, analytics/, domain/ are placeholder __init__.py only — contents migrate in V1-REFACT-003 through V1-REFACT-007.

V1-REFACT-002.title: Move kernel layer files + create shims
V1-REFACT-002.notes: All 7 files in kernel/: syscall_dispatcher, syscall_registry, syscall_versioning, syscall_handlers, resource_manager, tenant_context, scheduler_engine. services/ shims re-export including private _handle_* functions. Test patch targets updated to kernel.*.

V1-REFACT-003.title: Move memory subsystem files + create shims
V1-REFACT-003.notes: 10 files created in memory/: memory_persistence, memory_address_space, memory_capture_engine, memory_helpers, memory_ingest_service, memory_scoring_service, embedding_service, embedding_jobs, bridge, nodus_memory_bridge. Internal cross-refs updated: memory_scoring_service/embedding_jobs use memory.memory_persistence; memory_capture_engine uses memory.bridge; nodus_memory_bridge uses memory.memory_capture_engine; bridge uses memory.memory_persistence. 8 services/ shims + bridge/bridge.py + bridge/nodus_memory_bridge.py replaced with one-liner `from memory.X import *`. bridge/__init__.py updated to import from memory.* directly.

V1-REFACT-004.title: Move runtime layer files + create shims
V1-REFACT-004.notes: 12 files moved: flow_definitions, flow_definitions_extended, flow_engine, flow_registry, nodus_adapter, nodus_builtins, nodus_execution_service, nodus_flow_compiler, nodus_runtime_adapter, nodus_schedule_service, nodus_security, nodus_trace_service. Cross-refs between moving files updated (services.X → runtime.X). Shims created in services/ (from runtime.X import * + explicit private exports for _condition_falsy/_condition_truthy in nodus_flow_compiler). KNOWN: 78 intermediate test regressions from mock patches targeting services.* paths — will resolve in V1-REFACT-010.

V1-REFACT-005.title: Move agents layer files + create shims

V1-REFACT-008.title: Update all kernel imports + remove shims
V1-REFACT-008.notes: All services.* imports referencing kernel shims updated to kernel.* directly. 7 shim files deleted from services/: syscall_dispatcher.py, syscall_registry.py, syscall_versioning.py, syscall_handlers.py, resource_manager.py, tenant_context.py, scheduler_engine.py. Also fixed internal cross-refs inside kernel/ itself (kernel/syscall_dispatcher.py imported from services.syscall_registry and services.syscall_versioning; kernel/syscall_handlers.py from services.syscall_registry; kernel/scheduler_engine.py from services.resource_manager). All patch() strings in tests updated to kernel.* targets.

V1-REFACT-009.title: Update all memory imports + remove shims
V1-REFACT-009.notes: 43 files updated via bulk Python replacement script. Patterns replaced: services.memory_* -> memory.memory_*, services.embedding_* -> memory.embedding_*, import services.memory_persistence -> import memory.memory_persistence, bridge.bridge -> memory.bridge, bridge.nodus_memory_bridge -> memory.nodus_memory_bridge, from bridge import X -> from memory.bridge import X (for create_memory_node/link, recall_memories), from bridge import bridge -> import memory.bridge as bridge. `from bridge import suggest_from_memory` intentionally preserved (suggest_from_memory still lives in bridge/__init__.py). 10 shim files deleted: 8 services/ + bridge/bridge.py + bridge/nodus_memory_bridge.py. Final grep confirmed zero remaining references to old paths.

V1-REFACT-010.title: Update all runtime/agents/platform_layer imports + remove shims
V1-REFACT-010.notes: 30 import patterns. Fix `from services import scheduler_service` in main.py

V1-REFACT-011.title: Update all analytics/domain/core imports + remove shims
V1-REFACT-011.notes: After this: services/ contains only auth_service.py. Delete services/services__init__.py

V1-REFACT-013.title: Gate all domain routes behind ENABLE_DOMAIN_APPS flag
V1-REFACT-013.notes: ENABLE_DOMAIN_APPS: bool = False added to Settings. routes/__init__.py: _PLATFORM_APP_ROUTERS (18) always mounts; _DOMAIN_APP_ROUTERS (11: arm, freelance, leadgen, seo, social, authorship, research, search_history, rippletrace, network_bridge, main_router) gated. APP_ROUTERS built dynamically from env at import time. AINDY_ENABLE_LEGACY_SURFACE append preserved. .env.example updated.

V1-REFACT-014.title: Remove root-level debris files
V1-REFACT-014.notes: fix_backend.py, script.py, @echo off.bat, git_health_check.bat all still present at root. services__init__.py and legacy/ still present. Move legacy/ to archive/ with README note, don't delete.

V1-REFACT-015.title: Verify no stdlib platform collision
V1-REFACT-015.notes: Only `import platform` is in watcher/window_detector.py (stdlib OS detection, legitimate use). No application-level platform package exists. Safe to create platform_layer/.

V1-CONT-001.title: Add missing SystemEvent types for Genesis and Task
V1-CONT-001.notes: TASK_CREATED, TASK_STARTED, TASK_PAUSED, TASK_COMPLETED, TASK_FAILED appended after GENESIS_ACTIVATE_FAILED (lines 67-71). All Genesis constants unchanged.

V1-CONT-002.title: Wire Genesis routes through execution contract
V1-CONT-002.notes: emit_observability_event() at START+terminal for: message, synthesize, lock, activate. Uses core/observability_events.py for DB-backed writes via queue_system_event. Never raises.

V1-CONT-003.title: Wire Task routes through execution contract
V1-CONT-003.notes: emit_observability_event() added to create_task/start_task/pause_task/complete_task in task_services.py with try/except guard. TaskCreate schema: name optional, title alias with @model_validator(mode=before). task_router.py: terminal emit AFTER _execute_tasks() returns, user_id=None (avoids FK), payload includes task_id from closure. tests/v1_gates/conftest.py: _patch_session_local_to_engine autouse fixture re-patches SessionLocal to testing_session_factory after app fixture runs — ensures emit sessions survive pipeline rollbacks.

V1-CONT-004.title: Add contract enforcement integration tests
V1-CONT-004.notes: 6 tests: task.created HTTP (payload keys task_id+name), task.started/completed/paused via service layer, genesis.message.started HTTP (skip on 404/422), emit-fault resilience (patch raises, still 2xx). Module-level autouse _patch_session_local_to_engine uses testing_session_factory. tests/integration/conftest.py: ARRAY→JSON shim for SQLite compat.

V1-PLAT-001.title: Verify platform API key quickstart works end-to-end
V1-PLAT-001.notes: 5-test integration suite: create key (returns aindy_ raw key once), platform key authenticates syscall via X-Platform-Key header, scope enforcement (memory.read key blocked from memory.write syscall → 403), revoked key returns 401, list endpoint never exposes raw key. Also fixed: get_current_user now accepts X-Platform-Key header; syscall endpoint enforces API key scopes as capabilities; runtime/memory/*.py import fixes; async_job_service.py import fix; integration conftest list adapter added.

V1-PLAT-002.title: Ensure GET /platform/syscalls returns full registry with schemas
V1-PLAT-002.notes: Gate test V1-VAL-008 was already passing (SyscallEntry defaults stable=True). Set stable=False explicitly on: memory.list/tree/trace (MAS extensions), sys.v2.memory.read (v2 not yet stable), and all 23 domain handlers. Core 5 (memory.read/write/search, flow.run, event.emit) remain stable=True. GET /platform/syscalls already returns stable field via SyscallSpec.to_dict().

V1-PLAT-003.title: Simplify docker-compose.yml to PostgreSQL + FastAPI only
V1-PLAT-003.notes: Usage comment block added at top. api: AINDY_CACHE_BACKEND defaults to memory, depends_on only postgres. worker/frontend/redis: profiles [full]. mongo: profiles [full, social]. `docker compose up` = postgres+api only. `--profile full` = all services. `--profile social` adds mongo.

V1-PLAT-004.title: Verify API keys are hashed at rest
V1-PLAT-004.notes: SHA-256 (64 char hex) stored in key_hash. Raw key returned once on creation only. 17 tests added and passing: TestHashKey(4), TestGenerateKey(5), TestApiKeyNotStoredPlain(3), TestValidateKeyUsesHash(3), TestRevocation(2).

V1-PLAT-005.title: Configure CORS explicitly for production
V1-PLAT-005.notes: ALLOWED_ORIGINS read from env at main.py:286-296. CORSMiddleware uses explicit origin list. No wildcard. Defaults to localhost:5173,3000,5000 in dev.

V1-PLAT-006.title: Write and verify three end-to-end examples
V1-PLAT-006.notes: memory-analyzer, event-automation, scheduled-agent. Must run against docker-compose stack.

V1-PLAT-007.title: Verify Nodus CLI works against running instance
V1-PLAT-007.notes: nodus run + nodus trace must work

V1-PLAT-008.title: Review and complete OpenAPI spec annotations
V1-PLAT-008.notes: All platform-surface routes need summary + description + response_model

V1-REL-001.title: Write Getting Started documentation
V1-REL-001.notes: Max 600 words, real curl commands, < 15 min to first syscall

V1-REL-002.title: Write Syscall Reference documentation
V1-REL-002.notes: All v1 syscalls with input/output schema tables and SDK examples

V1-REL-005.title: Harden CI pipeline for V1 gate
V1-REL-005.notes: ruff + pytest --cov-fail-under=69 + docker build. All must pass before merge.

V1-REL-006.title: Perform fresh-clone quickstart verification
V1-REL-006.notes: On clean machine. Must complete in < 15 min. Any failures = bug, fix before tagging.

V1-REL-007.title: Write CHANGELOG.md [1.0.0] section
V1-REL-007.notes: Include: capabilities shipped, known limitations (sync SQLAlchemy, single-node), excluded scope

V1-REL-008.title: Tag v1.0.0 on green main
V1-REL-008.notes: git tag -a v1.0.0. Cannot execute until release_gate.py exits 0.
